name: ship
description: End-to-end GTM pipeline + credentials preflight. v0.1 ships the credentials health-check skill.

settings.name: Credentials Directory
settings.description: Absolute path to the directory containing your token files (default: ~/.config/ship/credentials)

settings.name: Credentials Extensions Directory
settings.description: Directory of additional YAML check definitions to merge into the core registry (default: $SHIP_CRED_DIR/extensions)
